userPrompt: Generate a short report about electric vehicles.

agents.name: researcher
agents.description: Collects facts and bullet points about the topic.
agents.output: Research result: EV adoption is rising, battery costs are declining, and charging networks are expanding.

agents.name: analyst
agents.description: Interprets the research and extracts insights.
agents.output: Analysis result: Market growth correlates with infrastructure investment; cost reductions drive broader adoption.

agents.name: writer
agents.description: Produces the final report from research and analysis.
agents.output: Final report: EVs are accelerating due to lower costs and improved infrastructure; policy and investment remain key.
